## Description
Briefly outline the purpose of this PR. What bug gets fixed or what feature gets added?

## Motivation and Context
Why is this change required? What problem does it solve?
If it fixes an open issue, please link to the issue here.

## Compliance
- [ ] I have read the `CONTRIBUTING.md` guidelines.
- [ ] My commits follow the conventional commits format (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, etc.).
- [ ] I have ensured my proposed agent or skill adheres to the ystack `taste-soft-skill` or `market-soft-skill` standards where required.
- [ ] The **Review** and **QA** agents have audited these proposed changes.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Agent Refinement (improving an existing LLM prompt/role)

## Any Output Changes?
If this PR affects how the swarm builds code or interfaces, please paste a snippet of the *before* and *after* outputs here, or attach screenshots.
